timeline.voiceover_text: Every morning, before you even open your eyes, the internet already knows who you are.
timeline.visual_prompt: Dark cinematic bedroom illuminated by phone notifications, soft blue light, realistic atmosphere, highly detailed

timeline.voiceover_text: Your searches, your likes, your pauses... every action leaves a trace.
timeline.visual_prompt: Close-up of social media icons floating around a person, digital particles, futuristic cyber aesthetic

timeline.voiceover_text: But this isn't just data anymore. It's prediction.
timeline.visual_prompt: Massive AI neural network visualisation with glowing connections, dark background, cinematic lighting

timeline.voiceover_text: Algorithms study your behaviour thousands of times faster than any human ever could.
timeline.visual_prompt: Fast-moving streams of code surrounding a human silhouette, futuristic sci-fi environment

timeline.voiceover_text: They know what captures your attention... and what controls your emotions.
timeline.visual_prompt: Extreme close-up of eyes reflecting social media feeds and advertisements, dramatic contrast

timeline.voiceover_text: The videos you watch are not random. Neither are the opinions you see.
timeline.visual_prompt: Infinite scrolling social media feed in a dark void, cinematic perspective, neon highlights

timeline.voiceover_text: Every recommendation is designed to keep you connected for just a little longer.
timeline.visual_prompt: Person trapped inside a glowing digital cage made of app icons and notifications, cyberpunk style

timeline.voiceover_text: And while you consume content... the system consumes you.
timeline.visual_prompt: Dark futuristic server room absorbing streams of human data, cinematic sci-fi atmosphere

timeline.voiceover_text: The real question is not whether you're being watched.
timeline.visual_prompt: Single camera lens slowly zooming in from darkness, ominous cinematic mood

timeline.voiceover_text: The question is... how much of your life is being programmed?
timeline.visual_prompt: Human silhouette dissolving into digital code, dramatic cyberpunk lighting, ultra detailed
